name: test condition for scoring_format_hash param, multiple fantasy points from play
description: Test case for test condition for scoring_format_hash param, multiple fantasy points from play
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2" as (select "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2023.tm) as teams, "nfl_games"."year" from "player_gamelogs_year_2023" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_REG_WEEK_19', '2023_REG_WEEK_20', '2023_REG_WEEK_21', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs_year_2023"."pid"), "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128" as (with "filtered_plays" as (select "nfl_plays"."bc_pid", "nfl_plays"."psr_pid", "nfl_plays"."trg_pid", "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid", "nfl_plays"."week", "nfl_plays"."seas_type", "nfl_plays"."year", "nfl_plays"."rush_yds", "nfl_plays"."rush_td", "nfl_plays"."pass_yds", "nfl_plays"."pass_td", "nfl_plays"."recv_yds", "nfl_plays"."comp", "nfl_plays"."int", "nfl_plays"."first_down", "nfl_plays"."play_type", "nfl_plays"."fuml" from "nfl_plays" where "nfl_plays"."play_type" not in ('NOPL') and ("nfl_plays"."bc_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."psr_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."trg_pid" is not null or "nfl_plays"."player_fuml_pid" is not null)) select "pid", SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from (select * from (select "bc_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(rush_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(rush_td::int, 0) * 6), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "bc_pid" is not null group by "bc_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "bc_stats" union all select * from (select "psr_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(pass_yds, 0) * 0.04 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 4 + COALESCE("int"::int, 0) * -1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "psr_pid" is not null group by "psr_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "psr_stats" union all select * from (select "trg_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(recv_yds, 0) * 0.1 + COALESCE(pass_td::int, 0) * 6 + COALESCE(comp::int, 0) * 1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "trg_pid" is not null group by "trg_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "trg_stats" union all select * from (select "player_fuml_pid" as "pid", ROUND(SUM(-1), 2) as fantasy_points_from_plays, "seas_type", "year" from "filtered_plays" where "player_fuml_pid" is not null group by "player_fuml_pid", "seas_type", "year") as "fuml_stats") as "combined_stats" group by "pid", "seas_type", "year" having SUM(fantasy_points_from_plays) > 0) select "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."points_per_game" AS "points_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0", CAST(t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128.fantasy_points_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "fantasy_points_from_plays_0", CAST(t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128.fantasy_points_from_plays AS DECIMAL) / NULLIF(CAST(tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2.rate_type_total_count AS DECIMAL), 0) AS "fantasy_points_from_plays_1", "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."year", "player"."pos" from "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid" left join "tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2" on "tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2"."pid" = "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid" and "tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2"."year" = 2023 inner join "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f" on "tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f"."pid" = "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid" and tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f.year = tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb.year and tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f.scoring_format_hash = 'ad64bf40cdfec0a1ebdf66453fa57687832f7556f3870251c044d5d270fc089e' left join "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128" on "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."pid" = "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid" and "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."year" = 2023 where "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."scoring_format_hash" = 'ad64bf40cdfec0a1ebdf66453fa57687832f7556f3870251c044d5d270fc089e' and player.pos IN ('WR') and tdbe64dafba7d186b6797b7756019b69f.points_per_game > '0' group by player.fname, player.lname, "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."points_per_game", "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."fantasy_points_from_plays", tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2.rate_type_total_count, "t4590257d3227cc6343df566e2bba7128"."fantasy_points_from_plays", tc54b179bcba249ad2965b8ad237192d2.rate_type_total_count, "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."year", "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "tb9b614943131b9f2cbe8a4753294dfcb"."pid" asc limit 500
